prose:
Ethylene frontier-orbital gap and energies — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`; the DFT was a single point on this fixed geometry, not optimized. SCF converged in 6 cycles.
HOMO = -7.6155818 eV
LUMO = -0.17986527 eV
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 7.4357165 eV.
No warnings reported.
The engine's integrity check reported `trustworthy: true`.
